posting.sourceTitle: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.sponsorName: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person only at Finishing Trades Institute of New York, 45-15 36th Street, Long Island City, NY, during the recruitment period, Monday through Friday from 9:00 a.m. to 3:30 p.m.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Finishing Trades Institute of New York, 45-15 36th Street, Long Island City, NY 11101
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 3:30 p.m., Monday through Friday, during the recruitment period
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 750 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Recruitment runs for 10 business days or until 750 applications have been issued, whichever comes first.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC. Proof will be required at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take a drug test prior to enrollment in apprenticeship, at the sponsor's expense.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC.
Proof of high school diploma or equivalent will be required at the time of enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must be physically able to perform the work of a painter, decorator, paperhanger as determined by site evaluations and a personal statement.
More information about the physical ability evaluation will be provided during a mandatory orientation.
Must take a drug test prior to enrollment in apprenticeship, at the expense of the sponsor.
Must be able to read, hear, and understand instructions and warnings in English.
Must sign an affidavit attesting to lifting and carrying material and equipment up to 70 pounds.
Must sign an affidavit attesting to working from ladders, scaffolds, lifts, and suspended scaffolds.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalent, pass physical ability screening, take a sponsor-paid drug test, understand English instructions and warnings, and sign lifting and ladder/scaffold affidavits.
posting.contactName: Finishing Trades Institute of New York
posting.contactSummary: Contact Finishing Trades Institute of New York at (718) 937-7440 for further information.
